examples: With her feet encased in heavy hob-nailed boots, this hot and shapeless little person toiled up the mountain.
Hob is not a bad fellow on the whole.
He accepted it as he put the coffee on the hob: She's left me.
The fire is thought to have started when a gas hob was accidentally left switched on.
She broke with establishment convention by hob-nobbing with film stars such as Bob Hope and Charlton Heston.
